# Biomed Family

> Loyalty rewards platform for Biomed Family pharmacy partners. Earn points on every qualifying purchase and redeem them for real prizes.

Biomed Family connects pharmacies and their teams to a points-based rewards program. Members track their balance, browse a live prize catalog, and claim rewards as they earn.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Biomed Family rewards program.
- [Sign in](/login): Sign in to your member account.
- [Create account](/signup): Register a new member account and pick your pharmacy.
- [Forgot password](/forgot-password): Request a password reset email.
